mapper.update: UPDATE users SET available_points = available_points + #{delta}, frozen_points = frozen_points + #{frozenDelta}, total_points = total_points + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND (available_points + #{delta}) >= 0 AND (frozen_points + #{frozenDelta}) >= 0
UPDATE users SET level = #{level}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays}, last_checkin_date = #{lastCheckinDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
